en.caption: Classic Theme
en.description: The iconic layout inspired by the original 1984 hardware synthesizer panel.

es.caption: Tema Clásico
es.description: El diseño icónico inspirado en el panel del sintetizador hardware original de 1984.

en.caption: TR-808 Theme
en.description: A vibrant skin utilizing the legendary color palette of the classic Roland TR-808 drum machine.

es.caption: Tema TR-808
es.description: Una interfaz vibrante que utiliza la legendaria paleta cromática de la clásica caja de ritmos Roland TR-808.

en.caption: ARP 2600 Theme
en.description: Industrial, bold design style inspired by the semimodular ARP 2600 synthesizer aesthetics.

es.caption: Tema ARP 2600
es.description: Estilo de diseño industrial y audaz inspirado en la estética del sintetizador semimodular ARP 2600.

en.caption: SH-101 Dark Theme
en.description: High-contrast dark mode inspired by the sleek gray and red lines of the Roland SH-101.

es.caption: Tema SH-101 Oscuro
es.description: Modo oscuro de alto contraste inspirado en las líneas grises y rojas del Roland SH-101.

en.caption: Deepmind 12 Theme
en.description: Modern look inspired by the wood-accented Behringer Deepmind 12 analog synthesizer.

es.caption: Tema Deepmind 12
es.description: Aspecto moderno inspirado en el sintetizador analógico Behringer Deepmind 12 con acabados de madera.

en.caption: Space Echo RE-201 Theme
en.description: Vintage vibe honoring the iconic green-accented control panel of the Roland RE-201 tape delay.

es.caption: Tema Space Echo RE-201
es.description: Vibras vintage que rinden homenaje al icónico panel verde del delay de cinta Roland RE-201.
